summary: Tested UI reorganization with tabs for StudentDashboard and TeacherDashboard. StudentDashboard has 3 tabs (الحصص, سجل حفظي, الرسائل) all working correctly. TeacherDashboard has 4 tabs (الحصص, الرسائل, الأدوات, الإدارة for admin) - code verified but requires Google OAuth for full testing. MessageInbox component properly integrated in both dashboards with conversation grouping, compose button, and empty state. All data-testid attributes verified present.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: StudentDashboard uses Radix Tabs with 3 tabs (home, progress, messages)
VERIFIED: TeacherDashboard uses Radix Tabs with 4 tabs (sessions, messages, tools, admin)
VERIFIED: MessageInbox component imported and used in both dashboards
VERIFIED: MessageInbox has conversation grouping by partner (student_id/teacher_id)
VERIFIED: MessageInbox shows unread count badges
VERIFIED: MessageInbox has reply and delete functionality
VERIFIED: All data-testid attributes present (student-tabs, teacher-tabs, message-inbox, progress-btn, compose-message-btn, etc.)
VERIFIED: Tab navigation works correctly - content switches between tabs
VERIFIED: Default tab content shows correctly (sessions/home tab)
VERIFIED: Browse teachers link navigates to /teachers page with 3 teacher cards
VERIFIED: Send message dialog opens with teacher select and textarea
VERIFIED: Login flow works for test student
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI reorganization complete. StudentDashboard and TeacherDashboard now use Radix Tabs from Shadcn/UI. StudentDashboard has 3 tabs (home/الحصص, progress/سجل حفظي, messages/الرسائل). TeacherDashboard has 4 tabs (sessions/الحصص, messages/الرسائل, tools/الأدوات, admin/الإدارة for admin only). MessageInbox component provides chat-like grouped conversations. TeacherDashboard requires Google OAuth to fully test - code review confirms correct implementation.

verified_features.student_home_tab: PASSED - Shows performance, stats, quick actions, sessions
verified_features.teacher_dashboard_tabs: CODE VERIFIED - 4 tabs (sessions, messages, tools, admin)
verified_features.message_inbox_grouping: PASSED - Groups messages by conversation partner
verified_features.message_inbox_empty_state: PASSED - Shows empty state when no messages
verified_features.browse_teachers: PASSED - Link works, shows 3 teacher cards
verified_features.send_message_dialog: PASSED - Opens with teacher select and textarea
